expectations.text: Response identifies the risk of flag collision without the `--` separator
expectations.evidence: "could cause a problem. itwillsync may try to interpret --model as one of its own flags, which would likely result in an error or unexpected behavior"

expectations.text: Response provides the correct syntax: `npx --yes itwillsync -- aider --model gpt-4o`
expectations.evidence: "npx --yes itwillsync -- aider --model gpt-4o" -- exact correct command provided

expectations.text: Response explains that itwillsync flags go before `--` and agent flags go after
expectations.evidence: "Everything before -- is interpreted by itwillsync, and everything after -- is passed directly to the agent"

expectations.text: Response does NOT indicate that `npx itwillsync aider --model gpt-4o` (without `--`) is safe to use
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly warns against the unsafe form and does not suggest it is safe
